---
title: "Page Not Found"
---

This Living Book page was not found.

Use one of the stable entry points:

- [Start](index.qmd)
- [Reader Path](reader_path.qmd)
- [Dictionary Index](dictionary.qmd)
- [Theorem Index](theorems.qmd)
- [Paper Index](papers.qmd)
- [Project Roadmap](roadmap.qmd)

The Living Book is generated from the Circle Calculus repository. If a link is stale, the source-of-truth path is still the theorem manifest, dictionary entry, paper manifest, or Lean declaration referenced from the indexes.

<script type="module" src="widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
